case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS ANDERSON PEARLIE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON PEARLIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON PEARLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON PEARLIE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,546.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
